titleStmt.title: SII 34.89: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 89. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the entrance, right side, into the gōpura of the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: The oil merchants (vāṇiya-nagaram) of Chintāmaṇi-perunderu and those of Tiruchiṟṟambalap-perunderu in the temple area made a gift of one nāḻi of gingili oil for bathing the god with it every Saturday from the month of Kumbha. The document was written by Iḍaṅgai-niyāya-chakravatti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarāja tēvarkki yāṇṭu 22
Āvatu kāmatavalli caturveti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟ
kōṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku cantirātitavarai cani Eṇṇaikkāppu cātti
yaruḷa ciṉacintāmaṇip perunteruvil vāṇiya nakarattōmum Iṉ
ṉāyaṉār tirumaṭai viḷākattu tirucciṟṟampalap peruṉteruvil vāṇi
yanakarattōmum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Ivvāṭṭai kumpanāya
ṟu mutal caṉi Oṉṟukku nāḻi Eḷḷeṇṇai Āka Aḷakka kaṭa
vōmāka kalveṭṭi kuṭuttōm Ippaṭi ceyyātārai nammi
ṉattil Oruvar Allarākavum civaturōkikaḷ paṭṭatuvum Iṉa
turōkikaḷ paṭṭatuvum paṭṭu naṉmmai tīmaikku puka kaṭavō
m Alār Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatitu kalveṭṭi kuṭuttōm vā
ṇiyanakarattōm Iṭaṅkai niyāyac cakkaravatti Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 34.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
